title: Sven's Phantom Jockeys
body:
![just a youtube thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50c5ac0f5b99f98dac3ebe230815c2e0eebb4d48_0.webp)
![sven](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7b59c94039996531efcced81cdc7af36c711692_0.webp)
- 3 New Vanilla-like Phantom Jockeys & 1 Item added: Zombie Phantom Jockey, Skeleton Phantom Jockey, and Creeper Phantom Jockey. They'll have 50% chance to spawn when the vanilla ones spawn. Can be saddled and when ridden they'll turn friendly. Burn in daylight.
- **Zombie Phantom**: has a Zombie rider, has standard stats, but deals 3 hearts of melee damage(Zombie & Phantom combined).
- **Skeleton Phantom**: has a Skeleton rider, fastest flyer with better shooting strategy, but only has half the health.
- **Creeper Phantom**: has a Creeper rider, dive-bombs player, slowest flyer but when ridden by player can trigger explosive boost speed.
- **Clock on a Stick**: crafted with a Fishing Rod and a Clock, used to control the movement of ridden phantoms.
- Free to report any bugs and share any improvements!
- More Info: Youtube/Bilibili-SvenTheOrangeBoy
